
func (s *Server) handleGETList(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {

	q := r.URL.Query()
	var query testapp.QueryList
	{
		if q := q.Get("n"); q != "" {
			i, err := strconv.ParseInt(q, 10, 0)
			if err != nil {
				s.httpErrBad(w, "unexpected value for query parameter: n", err)
				return
			}
			query.Count = int(i)
		}
	}
	{
		if q := q.Get("o"); q != "" {
			u, err := strconv.ParseUint(q, 10, 32)
			if err != nil {
				s.httpErrBad(w, "unexpected value for query parameter: o", err)
				return
			}
			query.Offset = uint32(u)
		}
	}
	body, err := s.app.GETList(query)
	if err != nil {
		s.httpErrIntern(w, r, nil, "handling App.List", err)
		return
	}
	if err := s.writeHTML(
		w, r, nil, nil, body, nil,
	); err != nil {
		s.logErr("rendering response of App.GETList", err)
		return
	}
}
